title: ExtractionPayload
description: Shape returned by _call_llm_json() for ENTER_RECORD / CRITIC_RETRY. Grounded in src/contracts.py ExtractionPayload TypedDict and validate_extraction_structure().

FieldExtraction.description: Single extracted field: claimed value + verbatim evidence span.

value.description: Extracted value (str, number, bool, or null).

evidence.description: Verbatim evidence span from the source text.

oneOf.description: Successful extraction with required and optional fields.

_error.description: Error message from LLM invocation failure.
